caption: [Gandalf](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Gandalf) proves that [Frodo](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Frodo_Baggins)'s Ring is the [One Ring](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/One_Ring) by throwing it into Frodo's fireplace, revealing the hidden text of the [Rhyme of the Rings](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Rhyme_of_the_Rings).
alt: [Gandalf](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Gandalf) proves that [Frodo](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Frodo_Baggins)'s Ring is the [One Ring](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/One_Ring) by throwing it into Frodo's fireplace, revealing the hidden text of the [Rhyme of the Rings](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Rhyme_of_the_Rings).
